_comment: Copy to credentials.json (gitignored) and fill in. The LRQ v2 API needs your tenant CONSOLE host, not the xdr.* V1 host. Two tokens with distinct sub claims roughly double the per-user rate budget via round-robin.
_S1_LRQ_TOKENS_note: Comma-separated list. Or set a single token via S1_CONSOLE_API_TOKEN.
_S1_LRQ_RPS_note: Per-token token-bucket rate. Stay under the 3 rps per-user cap.
_S1_LRQ_ACCOUNT_IDS_note: Leave empty to query with tenant=true. Set comma-separated account IDs to scope (forces tenant=false). Use this if tenant=true returns matchCount=0 on a multi-account tenant.
